ber%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20Game.dragonAura2%3FGame.dragonAura2%3A-1%2Cn%3Dt%3E%3D0%26%26(r%3D%3D%3Dt%7C%7Ca%3D%3D%3Dt)%2Ci%3Do%3E%3D0%26%26(r%3D%3D%3Do%7C%7Ca%3D%3D%3Do)%3Breturn%20n%26%26i%3F480%3An%3F500%3Ai%3F680%3A700%7Dfunction%20B(e%2Ct)%7Bif(!t)return%20null%3Bvar%20o%3DC()%3Breturn%20Math.max(1%2C(o-e)%2F2)%7Dfunction%20q(e)%7Breturn%22number%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20e.restingVal%26%26e.restingVal%3E0%3Fe.restingVal%3A10%2B5*(e.id%7C%7C0)%7Dfunction%20G(e%2Ct%2Co)%7Bvar%20r%3D(e-t)%2Fo%3Breturn-.5*r*r-Math.log(o)-.5*Math.log(2*Math.PI)%7Dfunction%20A(e%2Ct%2Co)%7Bfor(var%20r%3Do%7C%7C%22belief%22%2Ca%3De%5Br%5D%2Cs%3Dnew%20Array(6).fill(0)%2Cd%3D0%3Bd%3C6%3Bd%2B%2B)for(var%20c%3D0%3Bc%3C6%3Bc%2B%2B)s%5Bc%5D%2B%3Dn%5Bd%5D%5Bc%5D*a%5Bd%5D%3Bfor(var%20u%3Dnew%20Array(6)%2Cf%3D-1%2F0%2Cp%3D0%3Bp%3C6%3Bp%2B%2B)u%5Bp%5D%3DG(t%2Ci%5Bp%5D%2Cl%5Bp%5D)%2BMath.log(s%5Bp%5D%2B1e-12)%2Cu%5Bp%5D%3Ef%26%26(f%3Du%5Bp%5D)%3Bfor(var%20g%3D0%2Cv%3Dnew%20Array(6)%2Ch%3D0%3Bh%3C6%3Bh%2B%2B)v%5Bh%5D%3DMath.exp(u%5Bh%5D-f)%2Cg%2B%3Dv%5Bh%5D%3Bfor(var%20m%3D0%3Bm%3C6%3Bm%2B%2B)v%5Bm%5D%2F%3Dg%3Be%5Br%5D%3Dv%7Dfunction%20T(e%2Ct%2Co%2Cr%2Ca)%7Breturn%20a%26%26%22number%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20a.d%26%26r%3Ffunction(e%2Ct%2Co%2Cr%2Ca%2Cn)%7Bvar%20i%3Ds.horizon%2Cl%3Ds.numSimulations%2Cd%3DC()%2Cc%3D480%3D%3D%3Dd%3F.981%3A500%3D%3D%3Dd%3F.98%3A680%3D%3D%3Dd%3F.971%3A.97%2Cu%3D(Game.Objects.Bank%26%26Game.Objects.Bank.level%2C%5B.125%2C.25%2C.25%2C.125%2C.125%2C.125%5D)%3Bfunction%20f(e)%7Bif((3%3D%3D%3De%7C%7C4%3D%3D%3De)%26%26Math.random()%3C.7)return%205%3Bfor(var%20t%3DMath.random()%2Co%3D0%2Cr%3D0%3Br%3C6%3Br%2B%2B)if(t%3C(o%2B%3Du%5Br%5D))return%20r%3Breturn%205%7Dfunction%20p(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20e%2BMath.random()*(t-e)%7Dfor(var%20g%3D0%2Cv%3D0%2Ch%3D0%2Cm%3D0%3Bm%3Cl%3Bm%2B%2B)%7Bfor(var%20y%3De%2Cb%3Dt%2Cx%3Do%2Ck%3Da%3Fr%3AMath.floor(Math.random()*d)%2CF%3DMath.max(10%2Cd-k)%2CS%3D0%3BS%3Ci%3BS%2B%2B)%7Bswitch(b*%3Dc%2Cy%2B%3D.01*(n-y)%2CMath.random()%3C.3%26%26(y%2B%3Dp(-3%2C7)%2Cb%2B%3Dp(-.05%2C.0 )%7D)%2Cdocument.addEventListener(%22mouseup%22%2Cfunction()%7Be%3D!1%7D)%7D%7D()%7Dcatch(e)%7Breturn%7Dif(b)%7Bvar%20e%3Dj()%2Ct%3DM%26%26%22number%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20M.brokers%3FM.brokers%3A0%2Co%3D!1!%3D%3Ds.tradingEnabled%2Cr%3Do%3F%22%237ed957%22%3A%22%239a7830%22%2Cn%3D%5B'%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22hdr%22%3E%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22ttl%22%3EDough%20Jones%20Auto-Trader%3C%2Fdiv%3E'%2C'%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22nd%22%3E%3Cspan%20id%3D%22cctrader-min%22%20class%3D%22btn%22%20title%3D%22Minimize%22%3E%E2%80%93%3C%2Fspan%3E'%2C'%3Cspan%20id%3D%22cctrader-close%22%20class%3D%22btn%22%20title%3D%22Uninstall%22%3E%C3%97%3C%2Fspan%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E'%2C'%3Cdiv%20id%3D%22cctrader-body%22%3E'%2C'%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22nd%22%20style%3D%22display%3Aflex%3Balign-items%3Acenter%3Bjustify-content%3Aspace-between%3Bpadding%3A4px%200%3Bborder-bottom%3A1px%20solid%20rgba(255%2C255%2C255%2C0.1)%3Bmargin-bottom%3A4px%22%3E'%2C'%3Cspan%20style%3D%22font-size%3A11px%3Bcolor%3A%23c9b584%22%3EAuto-trade%3A%3C%2Fspan%3E'%2C'%3Cspan%20id%3D%22cctrader-toggle%22%20class%3D%22btn%22%20style%3D%22cursor%3Apointer%3Bcolor%3A'%2Br%2B%22%3Bfont-weight%3Abold%3Bfont-size%3A11px%3Bpadding%3A2px%208px%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%22%2Br%2B'%3Bborder-radius%3A3px%22%20title%3D%22Toggle%20live%20trading%20on%2Foff%22%3E'%2B(o%3F%22ON%22%3A%22OFF%22)%2B%22%3C%2Fspan%3E%22%2C%22%3C%2Fdiv%3E%22%2C'%3Ctable%3E%3Cthead%3E%3Ctr%3E%3Cth%20title%3D%22Return%20on%20deployed%20capital%2C%20per%20hour%20of%20deployment%22%3ERoD%2Fhr%3C%2Fth%3E%3Cth%3EStrategy%3C%2Fth%3E%3Cth%20title%3D%22Total%20P%26L%20in%20%24econds%22%3EP%26L%3C%2Fth%3E%3Cth%20title%3D%22Hours%20of%20capital-at-work%22%3EHrs%40wrk%3C%2Fth%3E%3Cth%3ES%2Fhr%3C%2Fth%3E%3Cth%3ETicks%3C%2Fth%3E%3C%2Ftr%3E%3C%2Fthead%3E%3Ctbody%3E'%5D%3BObject.keys(h).forEach(function(e)%7Bvar%20t%2Co%3DD(m%5Be%5D)%2Cr%3Dh%5Be%5D.name%2B(%22bayesian%22%3D%3D%3De%3F%22%20%E2%98%85%22%3A%22%22)%2Ca%3Do.returnOnDeployed%2Ci%3Dnull%3D%3Da%3F%22%23f0d89a%22%3Aa%3E0%3F%22%237ed957%22
